Project Title:
Cloud-based AI-powered Cybersecurity Orchestration Platform for IoT Devices

Problem Statement:
The increasing number of IoT devices has led to a significant rise in cyber threats. Existing security solutions often lack real-time monitoring and orchestration capabilities, making it challenging to detect and respond to threats effectively. This project aims to design a cloud-based AI-powered cybersecurity orchestration platform for IoT devices, ensuring real-time threat detection and response.

System Architecture:
The proposed system will consist of three primary components:
1. IoT Device Management: Responsible for collecting and processing data from IoT devices.
2. AI-powered Threat Detection: Utilizes machine learning algorithms to detect potential threats in real-time.
3. Cybersecurity Orchestration: Automates incident response and mitigation processes.

Tech Stack:
- Python
- TensorFlow
- AWS CloudFormation

- IoT Malware Dataset
